_meta.description: Verified C (Capture Share) and A (Autonomy) values per NAICS from public sources
_meta.C_sources: Damodaran NYU, AICPA/CPA.com, MarshBerry, SaaS Capital, KeyBanc, CAS Benchmark, Service Leadership, ADA, CMS, AVMA, Buildium, NRA, ATA/ATRI, SIA
_meta.A_sources: Anthropic Economic Index, McKinsey MGI 2024, Goldman Sachs GenAI 2023, O*NET 28.0, BLS Projections 2024-34, Frey-Osborne, AICPA, NAHC, CompTIA/Kaseya, MarshBerry, ADA, AMA, IAB, AIA, NRA, ATA Tech Council

5411.evidence: Am Law 100 PPP $3.15M +12.3% YoY, 30-40% partner margin

5415.evidence: MSP recurring 80%+, churn 8.4%, vertical MSPs +38% retention

6212.evidence: EBITDA 15-25%, licensing moat, no Medicare cap

6216.evidence: Medicaid 70% caps, but care plan stickiness

5311.evidence: 11% avg margin, top quartile 32%, recurring mgmt fees

2381.evidence: Margin 5.8% median / 13.2% top; maintenance 40-60% gross 80-90% renewal

2382.evidence: Plumbing gross 45-55%, weak recurring vs HVAC

6213.evidence: State licensing, insurance+cash mix, sticky visits

5621.evidence: Long-term municipal contracts, ~25% EBITDA at scale

5614.evidence: Klarna trap — gains passed to customer, thin margin

5617.evidence: Recurring contracts but commodity priced, ABM 6-8%

5418.evidence: Project+retainer mix, low switching cost, margin compressing
